subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-11-13
subcodes.first_line: When I was in Alexandria, Ahmad Aniss, the minister of [...] of the Khedivial court called upon me and proposed to me that he would like to arrange a meeting between his Highness the Khedive and myself.
